subject: iteration-0
detail: Probe as shipped in fn-83.1 (commit 5993c446). fn-81.1 replay: spawn with 32 path overlaps + 97 token matches — nearly all from `git add -A`-swept .flow bookkeeping (task/spec md edits, interleaved fn-82 spec authoring) and cross-directory basename matches on generic names (SKILL.md). Gate vacuous on real history.

subject: iteration-1
detail: Bookkeeping exclusion: .flow/tasks/, .flow/specs/, .flow/review-receipts/, .flow/review-runs/ removed from the touched-set AND from hunk tokenization (_PSP_BOOKKEEPING_PREFIXES). Durable .flow content (config.json, memory/, templates/, usage.md, bin/) stays. fn-81.1 replay: 32->15 overlaps, 97->16 tokens.

subject: iteration-2
detail: Basename arm restricted to DIRLESS refs: a ref with a directory part matches exact/dir-prefix only (the author was specific; --no-renames keeps old paths in the touched-set so stale full-path refs still match exactly). Kills cross-directory SKILL.md-matches-any-SKILL.md. Zero false skips on the corpus after both iterations.

subject: iteration-3-candidates
detail: Demoting generic dirless basenames (SKILL.md/phases.md/workflow.md) or ALL-CAPS prose tokens (NOT/ONLY/AND) = English-stoplist territory — rejected per repo doctrine (shape-based predicates only) and false-skip risk. Remaining negative spawns are GENUINE shared-scope references (shared flowctl.py Files entries, real shared symbols e.g. run_cursor_exec, plugins/flow-next/skills dir refs).

subject: false_skips
detail: HARD merge gate — must be 0 (truthful arm vs key-drift scenarios)
